text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Narita Brian's poor health persists, Hishi
Amazon believes in her—and doubles down on
her own training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian suffers a crushing defeat at the
autumn Tenno Sho. The audience is aghast by
how weak she is now, and their expectations
begin to fade...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But during an interview before the Japan Cup,
Hishi Amazon declares to everyone that her rival
is Narita Brian, and Narita Brian alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's adamant that her rival will make a
comeback. The conviction rubs off on the public,
restoring some of their faith.
